title: eriosema longipes
intro: Eriosema longipes, also known as the yellow bean or yellow pea, is a legume plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids in its leaves and seeds. The health benefits of Eriosema longipes include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction by boiling the leaves and seeds in water, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
